# services.ente

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.ente`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.ente.api.domain` | `string` | The domain under which the api will be served. |
| `services.ente.api.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Museum (API server for ente.io). |
| `services.ente.api.enableLocalDB` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the automatic creation of a local postgres database for museum.. |
| `services.ente.api.group` | `string` | Group under which museum runs. If you set this option you must make sure the group exists. |
| `services.ente.api.nginx.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable nginx proxy for the API server. |
| `services.ente.api.package` | `package` | The museum package to use. |
| `services.ente.api.settings` | `open submodule of (YAML 1.1 value)` | Museum yaml configuration. Refer to upstream [local.yaml](https://github.com/ente-io/ente/blob/main/server/configurations/local.yaml) for more information. You can specify secret values in this configuration by setting `somevalue._secret = "/path/to/file"` instead of setting `somevalue` directly. |
| `services.ente.api.settings.apps.accounts` | `string` | Set this to the URL where your accounts page is running. This is primarily for passkey support. |
| `services.ente.api.settings.apps.cast` | `string` | Set this to the URL where your cast page is running. This is for browser and chromecast casting support. |
| `services.ente.api.settings.apps.public-albums` | `string` | If you're running a self hosted instance and wish to serve public links, set this to the URL where your albums web app is running. |
| `services.ente.api.settings.db.host` | `string` | The database host |
| `services.ente.api.settings.db.name` | `string` | The database name |
| `services.ente.api.settings.db.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The database port |
| `services.ente.api.settings.db.user` | `string` | The database user |
| `services.ente.api.user` | `string` | User under which museum runs. If you set this option you must make sure the user exists. |
| `services.ente.web.domains.accounts` | `string` | The domain under which the accounts frontend will be served. |
| `services.ente.web.domains.albums` | `string` | The domain under which the albums frontend will be served. |
| `services.ente.web.domains.api` | `string` | The domain under which the api is served. This will NOT serve the api itself, but is a required setting to host the frontends! This will automatically be set for you if you enable both the api server and web frontends. |
| `services.ente.web.domains.cast` | `string` | The domain under which the cast frontend will be served. |
| `services.ente.web.domains.photos` | `string` | The domain under which the photos frontend will be served. |
| `services.ente.web.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Ente web frontend (Photos, Albums). |
| `services.ente.web.package` | `package` | The ente-web package to use. |
